name: store_manager_genie
description: Store Manager Genie for operational store performance, labor, and KPI insights.

name: executive_genie
description: Executive Genie for portfolio-level executive reporting, trend analysis, and strategic metrics.

name: supply_chain_genie
description: Supply Chain Genie for inventory, procurement, logistics, and fulfillment analytics.

name: sales_agent
description: Sales agent backed by a Genie space for structured data analysis. Use this for sales metrics, store performance, and operational reporting.

name: knowledge_assistant
description: Query the knowledge-assistant endpoint on Model Serving. Use this for documentation and policy lookups. The endpoint must have task type agent/v1/responses.

name: knowledge_assistant_product
description: Query the knowledge_assistant endpoint on Model Serving. Use this for product-specific knowledge and policy lookups. The endpoint must have task type agent/v1/responses.

name: lakebase_vector
description: Query the Lakebase-backed vector storage endpoint on Model Serving. Use this for semantic retrieval and vector-search style lookups. The endpoint must have task type agent/v1/responses.
